description_long: This is a freestanding shelving unit with a minimalist industrial design, featuring a sturdy black metal frame and three wooden shelves. The top and bottom shelves are wide and flat, suitable for storing or displaying various items, while a mid-level horizontal wooden bar adds structural support and visual interest. The wood has a rich, dark brown finish with visible grain, contrasting with the matte black metal supports. The open-back design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it versatile for use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or retail spaces. The overall construction appears robust, with the metal frame providing stability and the wooden shelves offering ample surface area for storage or display. There are no doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its open and accessible nature.
description: A freestanding industrial-style shelving unit with a black metal frame and three dark brown wooden shelves. The open design and sturdy construction make it ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three wooden shelves and the open, accessible design with a black metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the thickness of the wooden shelves supported by the metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the open-back structure and the alignment of the shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, displaying the slim side profile and shelf arrangement.
